FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f54fd46bb00>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-01T00:27:10Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-01T00:25:18Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-01T00:27:10Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-01T00:25:18Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/01 00:28:52.714948194 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/05/01 00:28:52.714975044 {

2026/05/01 00:28:52.715217038 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715232978 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715233879 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715250140 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715253306 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715268915 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715269706 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715284164 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715285075 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715300975 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715301877 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715341225 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715363261 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715364734 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715382798 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715383619 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715401343 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715402224 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715419296 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715420198 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715439063 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715439985 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715457688 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715458600 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715485099 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715486402 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715504225 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715505187 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715527238 "default"))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715528180 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715543779 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715544631 }
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715559338 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/05/01 00:28:52.715572658 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715587912 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/01 00:28:52.715606676 }
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715607628 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715622987 }
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715623828 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715639247 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]

2026/05/01 00:28:52.715658714 domain = NA)

2026/05/01 00:28:52.715678561 }
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715694501 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715695362 old$family <- family
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715714528 }

2026/05/01 00:28:52.715808965 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,

2026/05/01 00:28:52.715830014 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],

2026/05/01 00:28:52.714948194 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/05/01 00:28:52.714975044 {

2026/05/01 00:28:52.715217038 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715232978 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715233879 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715250140 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715253306 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715268915 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715269706 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715284164 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715285075 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715300975 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715301877 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715341225 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715363261 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715364734 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715382798 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715383619 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715401343 if (!missing(useKerning))

2026/05/01 00:28:52.715420198 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715439063 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715439985 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715457688 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715458600 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715485099 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/05/01 00:28:52.715504225 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715505187 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715527238 "default"))
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715528180 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715543779 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715544631 }
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715559338 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/05/01 00:28:52.715572658 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715587912 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/01 00:28:52.715606676 }
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715607628 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715622987 }
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715623828 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715639247 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]

2026/05/01 00:28:52.715657462 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715658714 domain = NA)
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715677589 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715678561 }
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715694501 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715695362 old$family <- family
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715714528 }
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715715720 version <- old$version

2026/05/01 00:28:52.715808965 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,

2026/05/01 00:28:52.715830014 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/01 00:28:52.715854119 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,

2026/05/01 00:28:52.715881811 invisible()
